summary: Recent updates to WebRTC, the technology behind real-time video and audio communication, introduce important enhancements regarding H.264 video capabilities. The browser will now **reject queries for H.264 video when the requested resolution or frame rate exceeds the supported limits**, ensuring better compatibility and performance during video calls. Additionally, a new parser for H.264 format parameters has been implemented along with comprehensive tests, which will help developers ensure that their applications can handle video streams more reliably and efficiently. These changes aim to improve user experience by maintaining high-quality video while preventing issues related to unsupported configurations.
